contact.heading: TALK TO THE TEAM
contact.responseTime: We respond within 24 hours. Usually faster.
faq.q1.question: How do I get started?
faq.q1.answer: Download OPS from the App Store or sign up at app.opsapp.co. Create your company, invite your crew, and you're running in minutes. No setup call required.
faq.q2.question: Does OPS work offline?
faq.q2.answer: Yes. Your crew can view schedules, update projects, and take photos without cell service. Everything syncs automatically when connectivity returns.
faq.q3.question: Can I import existing data?
faq.q3.answer: Manual import available now with our help — we'll move your projects, clients, and crew data over for free. One-click import coming Q3 2026. Either way, you don't lose your history.
faq.q4.question: Is my data secure?
faq.q4.answer: Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use industry-standard security practices and never share your information with third parties.
faq.q5.question: What devices does OPS support?
faq.q5.answer: OPS is available on iPhone and iPad via the App Store, and on any device through the web app at app.opsapp.co.
faq.q6.question: How do I get help?
faq.q6.answer: Email hello@opsapp.co or use the in-app feedback button. We respond within 24 hours — usually much faster.
bottomCta.heading: START RUNNING YOUR OPERATION
